title: Kernel Registry — Connection Handshake
description: Schema for initiating a connection between two Knowledge Nodes. Both nodes must verify each other's hash chain before the connection is confirmed.

initiator_hash.description: Root hash of the node initiating the connection.

target_hash.description: Root hash of the node being connected to.

initiator_seeking_matched.description: Initiator's seeking items matched by target's offering.

target_seeking_matched.description: Target's seeking items matched by initiator's offering.

shape_match.description: Shape compatibility analysis between the two nodes.

confirmed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of confirmation, if confirmed.

initiator_chain_verified.description: Whether the target has verified the initiator's hash chain.

target_chain_verified.description: Whether the initiator has verified the target's hash chain.
